message:
ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│
We Bharat Book of Records, wanted to give a platform for your students who got unique talents and capabilities to be in our Book of Records which will be a pride moment for our organization too

Bharat Book of Records has been the undisputed curator and the custodian of Bharat Records. For us, it is simply not about making a record; but pushing the human boundaries and overcoming individual limitations.

Our editorial team works tirelessly to verify, process, and authenticate your achievements; in an unbiased manner to select the deserving record. 

Bharat Book of Records organizes a тАШRecord Holders Exchange ProgrammeтАЩ every year, wherein Bharat Book of Record holders get an opportunity to interact with other  record holders. This activity coincides with the launch of the new edition of the Bharat Book of Records

Every year, Bharat Book of Records holders get nominated Pride of Nation Award and are facilitated; at the event of the Independence Day

Note: Need any further assistance to apply, kindly call us on +91-9845732329 or follow the link below

message: Dance for India

Invited  Smt Vyjayanthi Kashi is an Indian classical dancer, a kuchipudi exponent. She is Grand daughter of of Dr Gubbi Veeranna who was an legendary Kannada director, one of the pioneers and most prolific contributors to Kannada theatre. Vyjayanthi Kashi is a reputed kuchipudi dancer,a celebrated performer and choreographer and artistic director of a dance school Shambhavi School of Dance where they teaches this traditional dance form kuchipudi. She was also the chairperson of Karnataka Sangeetha Nritya Academy
#National_Award_Winner

ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│ЁЯЗоЁЯЗ│
We Bharat Book of Records, wanted to give a platform for your students who got unique talents and capabilities to be in our Book of Records which will be a pride moment for our organization too

Bharat Book of Records has been the undisputed curator and the custodian of Bharat Records. For us, it is simply not about making a record; but pushing the human boundaries and overcoming individual limitations.

Our editorial team works tirelessly to verify, process, and authenticate your achievements; in an unbiased manner to select the deserving record. 

Bharat Book of Records organizes a тАШRecord Holders Exchange ProgrammeтАЩ every year, wherein Bharat Book of Record holders get an opportunity to interact with other  record holders. This activity coincides with the launch of the new edition of the Bharat Book of Records

Every year, Bharat Book of Records holders get nominated Pride of Nation Award and are facilitated; at the event of the Independence Day

Note: Need any further assistance to apply, kindly call us on +91-9845732329 or follow the link below

message: Dance for India

Invited  Smt Vyjayanthi Kashi is an Indian classical dancer, a kuchipudi exponent. She is Grand daughter of of Dr Gubbi Veeranna who was an legendary Kannada director, one of the pioneers and most prolific contributors to Kannada theatre. Vyjayanthi Kashi is a reputed kuchipudi dancer,a celebrated performer and choreographer and artistic director of a dance school Shambhavi School of Dance where they teaches this traditional dance form kuchipudi. She was also the chairperson of Karnataka Sangeetha Nritya Academy
#National_Award_Winner
